_publications._publicationTitle: Notch signaling via Hey1 and Id2b regulates Müller glia's regenerative response to retinal injury.

_contextSnippet: Like Dll4 knockdown, dll4 gene editing resulted in an expanded zone of injury-responsive proliferating MG without affecting cell death
details: When combined with ubi:Cas9, resulted in dll4 gene deletions that expanded the zone of injury-responsive proliferating MG without affecting cell death
